steps.title: Write the line from one point and the slope
steps.content: The table is linear with slope $2$ and includes the point $(3,7)$. A line with slope $2$ has form $y=2x+b$. Substitute $(3,7)$: $$7=2(3)+b$$ so $b=1$ and $y=2x+1$.

steps.title: Use a list to fill the missing table values
steps.content: For the row with output $11$, solve $11=2x+1$, so $x=5$. For the row with input $12$, compute $y=2(12)+1=25$.
